key.name: network-interface
key.description: The physical network interface used for network discovery and packet capture.

key.name: gemini-api-key-ref
key.description: Logical reference identifier for the Gemini API Key stored in Keyring.

key.name: retention-period-days
key.description: Number of days to preserve session data before automatic purging.

key.name: store-hosts
key.description: Whether discovered hosts can be stored in the session database.

key.name: store-history
key.description: Whether session scan history and alerts can be stored.
